name: Connection Test
description: Validate your transcription engine configuration using a bundled test audio file. Run this after installation or when changing settings.

name: Transcribe & Analyze
description: Process an audio or video file (MP3/WAV/MP4) through the configured transcription engine and return a full transcript with structured JSON summary.

name: Safe Cleanup
description: Safely delete source media files after verified transcription success. Runs automatically if auto-remove is enabled.
